title: GAME Meitantei Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: [GAME] Meitantei Evangelion             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 13, 2012 6:51 pm Okay, I only found a closed thread about this game, [s]actually I don't understand why it got closed[/s], and a thread about the booklet scans (good stuff BTW, thanks Riotgear), so I decided to open a new one as I mentioned in this thread . [edit]OK, I should start reading reading the posts after the first one ....[/edit] I decided to play this game because the CGs left me fairly "impressed", almost at the beginning of the game we get a killed girl who looks terribly a lot like Nadia, I screamed like an obsessed "How dare you kill my waifu! Bastards!": Gore warning  SPOILER: Show

Article: GAME Meitantei Evangelion
[]: [GAME] Meitantei Evangelion             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 13, 2012 6:51 pm Okay, I only found a closed thread about this game, [s]actually I don't understand why it got closed[/s], and a thread about the booklet scans (good stuff BTW, thanks Riotgear), so I decided to open a new one as I mentioned in this thread . [edit]OK, I should start reading reading the posts after the first one ....[/edit] I decided to play this game because the CGs left me fairly "impressed", almost at the beginning of the game we get a killed girl who looks terribly a lot like Nadia, I screamed like an obsessed "How dare you kill my waifu! Bastards!": Gore warning  SPOILER: Show
